prompt: The KDC-One PO ack just came in — update PO #100336 in PLM
assertions: The proposal is an UPDATE on the existing PO, not an INSERT of a new PO record
The preview shows a current value → new value comparison rather than just the new value alone
The output states the write will be staged and handed to plm-assistant rather than committed directly via execute_sql
An Asana sync-back comment on the related PD task is mentioned as a follow-on step
The skill does not claim to have created a new Asana task (that is outlook-asana-bridge's job, not this skill's)
